summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without selecting a shared canonical. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and fix PRs. The open PRs are focused technical changes that require maintainer review or author/proof follow-up; one linked security-sensitive historical PR is routed to central security handling only.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned focused PR with active author/proof follow-up and failing relevant proof, so automation should not close, merge, or replace it.
Focused UI/session behavior fix needs maintainer technical review rather than inventory automation.
Ready focused performance PR needs maintainer correctness review; merge is blocked by job policy.
Focused memory behavior fix is not closable or mergeable by this inventory job and needs maintainer review.
This appears to be the surviving Copilot catalog fix path, but it needs maintainer review and this job cannot merge or open follow-up fixes.
Security-sensitive linked ref is out of ProjectClownfish mutation scope and must be handled by central security triage.
Related open issue should remain open pending the hydrated candidate PR #91728 and maintainer review.
Kept related within the memory-core family; no dedupe or closure action is safe in this inventory job.
Closed historical PR; no mutation is valid.
Kept as the related surviving PR for the Copilot catalog family; maintainer review is required before any merge decision.
Related duplicate-like issue is covered by the #88548/#91728 family but should not be closed before the candidate fix lands.
Already closed superseded PR; no additional close action is valid.
Closed historical related PR; no mutation is valid.
Keep issue open and related to candidate PR #93350 until the candidate is reviewed and landed.
Kept as a related focused performance PR; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed by this job.
